title: Better Vanilla Plus
description: This assembly will give you a lot of gaming experience in a world filled with different creatures and settlements.
body:
This assembly will give you a lot of gaming experience in a world filled with different creatures and settlements. Discover new lands with the help of your atlas, create large factories with the help of the legendary Create, and fight together with new abilities and items. All this awaits you in the assembly, but of course the rules of the vanilla game are followed.
  The assembly contains a new generation, new biomes, new structures, recolors of vanilla structures for other biomes, improved sounds and balanced gameplay. The Minecraft world has been changed almost beyond recognition, but everything is still vanilla and playable. This build doesn't have a lot of unnecessary junk and unnecessary useless items. Invent, create, survive, study - whatever your heart desires!
  
  ![Updated taiga](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d6ecf962b6447592dce8b911289649aade5ac0e.png)
  
  The assembly is optimized for a large number of devices, everything is configured and installed, all you have to do is create a world or adjust the graphics or control settings to suit you.
  - The mods contain the most optimal and universal parameters.
  - It is **not recommended** to disable resource packs.
  - **Complementary Shaders** are already tuned to balance performance while sticking to vanilla graphics.
  - It is highly recommended to play with friends, this will make the gameplay more fun. The assembly contains the Essential mod, which allows you to interact with players.
  There should be no errors in the assembly.

  Minimal system requirements:
  - Core: any quad core cpu 3.0 Ghz.
  - GPU: AMD rx 460 / NVIDIA GeForce GTX 960 (with low graphics or without shaders)
  - RAM: 8gb
  - Storage: hdd 5gb (may vary depending on the number of worlds)
  
  Recommended system requirements:
  - Core: AMD Ryzen 3 3200 / INTEL Core i3 12100
  - GPU: AMD radeon 6600xt / NVIDIA GeForce GTX 2060 super (with shaders on average or max graphics)
  - RAM: 12gb
  - Storage: ssd 5-50gb (may vary depending on the number of worlds)

  Regarding errors, conflicts or suggestions - see my official channel for this assembly in telegram - [https://t.me/bettervanillaplus](https://t.me/bettervanillaplus)
  
 
  ![Night in the forest.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92ef02bd237b3d6c0ca9667de509c2346e827172.png)
